title: Claude swarm surfaces - official vs community deep intake
policy: Static research/planning only. URLs were gathered by read-only web search in June 2026 and are recorded for the operator to verify; nothing is installed, cloned, or executed. Official Claude Code surfaces are described from first-party docs plus this agent's own operating context; reported version numbers/dates are secondary and marked verify. Community repos are recorded with their URLs but stay study-only until the operator verifies owner/repo/license. Everything that can launch real agents stays DISABLED for Ghoti until a separate, audited, human-approved controlled-launcher milestone.

sides.claude_side: inside Claude Code / the Claude profile - features that run within Claude Code itself
sides.ghoti_side: repo-controlled launcher/coordinator that drives Claude/Codex/Hermes from this repo (planned, gated)

official_claude_surfaces.what_it_is: A separate worker with its own context window, spawned to handle a sub-task and report a result back to the main session.
official_claude_surfaces.automatic_or_manual: model-invoked (the main agent decides); also definable as named agent types
official_claude_surfaces.token_cost: moderate - each subagent has its own context
official_claude_surfaces.needs_worktrees: no (shares the session tree); worktrees help if subagents edit in parallel
official_claude_surfaces.ghoti_default_status: guidance_only (Ghoti models the roles but runs them manually, one per task)
official_claude_surfaces.notes: Verified by direct use in this repo's tooling (the Task/Agent mechanism). The doc slug should be confirmed.

official_claude_surfaces.what_it_is: A list view to manage many Claude sessions; background sessions run async. /bg pushes the current session to the background; `claude --bg "<task>"` launches a fresh background session.
official_claude_surfaces.token_cost: moderate-to-high - multiple live sessions run in parallel
official_claude_surfaces.needs_worktrees: recommended - parallel real sessions should be isolated per worktree
official_claude_surfaces.ghoti_default_status: should_stay_disabled (Ghoti does not launch live agents yet)
official_claude_surfaces.notes: The operator's '/batch' appears to be a mislabel; the documented background command is /bg (and `claude --bg`). Verify exact commands in the profile.

official_claude_surfaces.what_it_is: Coordinate multiple Claude Code instances: one team lead assigns/synthesizes; teammates each run in their own context and can communicate. Reported to support 2-16 agents.
official_claude_surfaces.automatic_or_manual: manual to start; teammates then coordinate semi-autonomously
official_claude_surfaces.token_cost: high - many parallel sessions (see 'what parallel sessions actually cost')
official_claude_surfaces.needs_worktrees: yes for safe parallel edits on a shared codebase
official_claude_surfaces.notes: Reported experimental: enable via env CLAUDE_CODE_EXPERIMENTAL_AGENT_TEAMS; reported to need a recent Claude Code version. Treat version/date specifics as verify-in-profile.

official_claude_surfaces.what_it_is: A JavaScript script (written by Claude) that orchestrates subagents at scale; a runtime executes it in the background while the session stays responsive. Research preview.
official_claude_surfaces.automatic_or_manual: manual to start; then automated orchestration
official_claude_surfaces.token_cost: high - orchestrates many subagents in phases
official_claude_surfaces.ghoti_default_status: should_stay_disabled (executes generated JS that launches many agents)
official_claude_surfaces.notes: Research preview; reported to need a recent Claude Code version and a paid plan / API / cloud provider. The generated JS is executable - keep off until audited.

official_claude_surfaces.what_it_is: Operator-listed command. Not found as a Claude Code command in June-2026 search; the actual background command is /bg, and dynamic workflows use /workflows.
official_claude_surfaces.notes: No '/batch' command confirmed. Likely a mislabel for /bg (background) or /workflows (dynamic workflows). Operator to confirm in the profile; do not assume it exists.

official_claude_surfaces.what_it_is: A SKILL.md folder of instructions/knowledge the model loads on demand (progressive disclosure); may bundle scripts.
official_claude_surfaces.ghoti_default_status: guidance_only (Ghoti uses repo playbooks as skills)
official_claude_surfaces.notes: Verified by direct use. Risk comes only from any scripts a skill bundles.

official_claude_surfaces.what_it_is: Shell commands wired to lifecycle events (pre/post tool, session start/stop) via settings; run code deterministically and can block/modify tool calls.
official_claude_surfaces.token_cost: n/a (they run code, not model turns)
official_claude_surfaces.ghoti_default_status: should_stay_disabled (executable; highest-risk building block; Ghoti keeps hook-as-validator as an idea only)
official_claude_surfaces.notes: Verified by direct knowledge of the settings hook mechanism. A hook can take live actions, so it stays off until a separate audited milestone.

official_claude_surfaces.what_it_is: git worktrees: multiple working trees on one repo, one branch each - the isolation substrate for parallel real agents.
official_claude_surfaces.ghoti_default_status: enabled (Ghoti already uses one branch/worktree per task)
official_claude_surfaces.notes: Already the backbone of Ghoti's one-agent-per-task pattern. The controlled launcher would use worktree-per-agent.

community_surfaces.what_it_is: A curated bundle of Claude Code commands/agents/skills/hooks plus security-scanner patterns.
community_surfaces.notes: ECC = Everything Claude Code, NOT elliptic curve cryptography. Same author also has affaan-m/claude-swarm. Re-verify license before any intake.

community_surfaces.what_it_is: An 'agent swarm intelligence' launcher: one command, a human gives the goal, an agent team orchestrates. Reported compatible with Claude Code, Codex, OpenClaw, nanobot, Cursor; state kept as local JSON, no DB/server/cloud.
community_surfaces.notes: Forks/variants seen: win4r/ClawTeam-OpenClaw, zeyuyang8/claw-team. Related but distinct: The-Swarm-Corporation/ClawSwarm, swarmclawai/swarmclaw. Verify license; study the one-command + local-JSON-state design only.

community_surfaces.what_it_is: Multi-agent orchestration SKILLS for Claude Code and Codex. Reported skills: super-swarm, swarm-planner (Plan Mode), parallel-task (rolling pool of up to 15 concurrent subagents).
community_surfaces.ghoti_default_status: study_then_guidance (skills could be re-expressed; do not run)
community_surfaces.notes: This is a Claude-Code SKILLS repo and is DISTINCT from the enterprise framework kyegomez/swarms (swarms.ai). Verify license; the parallel-task skill launches real subagents, so keep off.

community_surfaces.what_it_is: Multi-agent orchestration for Claude Code: decompose tasks, coordinate agents, visualize in a terminal UI.
community_surfaces.notes: Same author as affaan-m/ecc. Its terminal-UI visualization parallels Ghoti's Agent Arena. Study only.

community_surfaces.what_it_is: The enterprise 'Swarms' multi-agent orchestration framework (swarms.ai). The big, different-owner project that the operator handle am-will/swarms is NOT.
community_surfaces.ghoti_default_status: tier2_later (heavy framework; not needed for the minimal launcher)
community_surfaces.notes: Recorded to disambiguate from am-will/swarms. Verify license; likely far larger than Ghoti's minimal controlled launcher needs.
